privacy.publicOutputs: Aggregated data only; source IPs, submission timestamps, and raw free-text answers are not included.
privacy.privateRows: Use --write-private-rows to export anonymized row-level data into survey-private/, which is git-ignored.

markerPolicy.(跳过): Preserved as status=skipped_by_logic and excluded from option counts.
markerPolicy.(空): Preserved as status=empty_marker and excluded from option counts.
markerPolicy.otherWithDetail: Values shaped like label〖detail〗 are split into label/detail; public aggregates count labels and detail presence only.
